prompt: A moody full-body fashion portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} standing in a narrow urban alley or tunnel covered in dense colorful graffiti, photographed at night with dramatic low-key lighting and flash-lit realism. She is leaning casually against the wall with 1 hand touching a large pair of over-ear black headphones and 1 hand tucked into the front pocket of an oversized {argument name="hoodie color" default="mustard yellow"} hoodie. The hoodie is long enough to read almost like a hoodie dress and has a simple black smiley-face graphic centered on the chest with white drawstrings. She wears a black backpack with 2 visible shoulder straps, white crew socks, and chunky black-and-white low-top sneakers. Her legs are bare, and her pose is relaxed with one knee slightly bent and one foot set forward. Her hair is shoulder-length, slightly messy, and {argument name="hair color" default="dark blonde"}. Compose the shot vertically from head to shoes, with the subject centered slightly left of frame. The background is a gritty painted wall dominated by turquoise blue, yellow, pink, and black spray paint, with drips, tags, and abstract cartoon-like graffiti shapes creating a raw street-art atmosphere. The floor is dark, worn, and reflective with paint splatters. Use high contrast, deep shadows, realistic skin and fabric texture, editorial streetwear photography style, underground urban vibe, sharp focus on clothing and body, subdued facial detail, and a cinematic dark nightlife mood.
translatedPrompt: 一张充满情绪感的全身时尚人像，主角是一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"}，站在一条布满浓密彩色涂鸦的狭窄城市小巷或隧道中，在夜间拍摄，采用戏剧性的低调照明和闪光灯摄影的写实风格。她随意地靠在墙上，一只手触碰着一副大型黑色头戴式耳机，另一只手插在超大号 {argument name="hoodie color" default="芥末黄"} 连帽衫的前兜里。连帽衫长度足以当作连帽裙穿着，胸前印有一个简单的黑色笑脸图案，配有白色抽绳。她背着一个黑色双肩包，露出 2 条肩带，穿着白色中筒袜和厚底黑白低帮运动鞋。她双腿裸露，姿势放松，一膝微屈，一只脚向前迈出。她的头发齐肩，略显凌乱，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="深金色"}。采用竖构图，从头到脚拍摄，主体位于画面略偏左的位置。背景是一面粗犷的喷漆墙，以蓝绿色、黄色、粉色和黑色喷漆为主，伴有滴漆、涂鸦签名和抽象的卡通涂鸦形状，营造出原始的街头艺术氛围。地面昏暗、磨损且带有反光的油漆溅痕。使用高对比度、深邃阴影、逼真的皮肤和织物纹理，呈现编辑级街头摄影风格、地下城市氛围，服装和身体细节清晰对焦，面部细节柔和，营造出电影般的暗夜生活氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 城市涂鸦连帽衫时尚人像：此提示词可生成一张逼真的全身街头风人像，描绘了一位身穿超大号连帽衫的年轻女性在色彩斑斓的涂鸦墙前摆拍，非常适合城市时尚和夜生活主题的 AI 图像创作。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
